general.title: Title
general.point3addfrontback: 4. Select a custom front or back cover for your report
general.calculator_description: Change the factor or the Height and Width to see the new price
general.selllist: This is the list of all artwork you sold. Details on the sale when available by clicking on a card.
general.noselection: To connect artworks to a customer you should first select them from the Artwork list
general.howtosell: Select a customer and confirm the operation. The artwork pieces will be connected with the customer selected.
general.selectimage: Select an image from media library or upload one
general.startselections: Select pieces from the Artwork menu to create lists.
general.notvalidname: It must start with a letter or number and contains only numbers and letters and spaces
general.selectfields: 2. Select what to show on reports
general.downloadData: Download your data as a CSV file
general.downloadImages: Download your images as ZIP file
general.name: Media Name
general.startentering: Start by adding your artwork here
general.startenteringmedia: Start by adding your media here
general.startenteringshow: Start by adding your shows here
general.registrationsuccess: Registration was a success. You should receive shortly an email to confirm your account.
general.registrationalready: Seems like this email is in use, or some error occurred. Please try again.
general.nopage: Looks like this page is not available.
general.operationselections: Choose an action below for your {{sels}} selected artwork.
general.wronglogin: Could not verify your info. Try Again.
general.sendagain: Uhm...I did not receive it yet
general.howtoshows: Keep track of where all your artwork is displaying. Register locations, vernissages and finissages for all your shows.
general.howtocustomer: Keep a list of all your customers, and the artwork they have from you.
general.howtoregister: Enter your email, and we will send you a link to confirm registration and set your password. The service is free, and you can enjoy managing and organizing your artwork.
general.passworderror: Uhm...maybe your link has expired. Request another link.
general.successreset: We have sent a reset link to {{email}}. If the email is valid, you should receive a reset link. Please allow a few minutes for the email to arrive
general.resetExplain: Enter your email to receive the reset link.
general.passwordExplain: Type in your new password, and click confirm. If evrything goes well you can login with your new password.
general.termscondition: I agree on the Terms & Conditions
general.typein: Enter an email and a password
general.emailerror: Looks like the email format is wrong
general.tokenexpired: Seems like this URL has expired.
general.registrationsuccessfull: Thank you for registering to Artinventory. Now you can login with your email and the password you set up during registration
general.registerText: Be part of Artinventory community managing, and organizing your artwork with ease
general.welcome: Nice to see you on Artinventory!
general.welcomeText: With Artinventory managing your artworks, creating a work list or organizing your art is easy. Artinventory has already a set of features which makes your work as an artist easier, but we would like to hear from you in order to make it even better. Send us your valuable feedback, whether it is a functionallity issue or a new feature you would like to see.
general.image: Image Selection. Additional images can be uploaded later if necessary.
general.upload: Click or drop a file to upload
general.feedbacksuccess: Your feedback has been sent. Thank you!
general.explainSelection: To add elements to this list please select them from the artwork page list and then select this list. Do not worry about duplicates, the system will filter them out for you.
general.howtoreport: Select a list and a report, then preview or download directly. If you need a customized report let us know by providing a feedback message.
general.manageCategories: Add, remove or edit your categories
general.manageArttypes: Add, remove or edit your art types
general.manageStatuses: Add, remove or edit your artwork status
general.suredelete: Are you sure you want to delete this record?
general.sureremove: Remove this item from the list?
general.couldnotdelete: The system could not delete the record. Please try again later.
general.couldnotupdate: The system could not update the record. Please try again later.
general.addtolistdescription: Type in a name to create a new list, or select an existing list to add the elements to

explain.profilepersonal: This is your personal area. You can store useful information about you and use them in the reports, or export them as a nice card to share with people
explain.profilework: This is your work area. You can store useful information about your work and use them in the reports, or export them as a nice card to share with people
explain.settingscategories: Links to manage your categories, status and art types to better organize your work.

card.categoryText: Group your artwork into meaningful buckets for better filtering and searching. Use Categories such as Landscapes, Self Portrait or Collages, or Types such as Painting, or Etching, and control the state of your artwork with Status, for example Sold, or Showing in a gallery, or not ready yet.
card.artworkText: Easily create and manage your artwork by entering the details of a piece of art such as its name, dimensions, price and media type. Also categorize and upload images to complete the artwork entry. Use the search and filter options to fast find a artpiece or grop them into selections useful for many extra features.
card.mediaText: Upload here and mange your media files. Upload pictures and list them with their properties such as dimensions and whether they are connected to an artpiece. If you do not need a media file anymore, you can delete it except if it is connected with some of your valuable artpieces.
card.reportText: Create lists by selecting your artwork and use them to group items or to print reports as PDF downloads. There are several PDF report to create and more to come.

general.title: Titolo
general.selllist: Questa è la lista delle vendite. Cliccando sulla scheda puoi vedere i dettagli.
general.noselection: Per collegare opere ad un cliente devi prima selezionarle dalla lista opere.
general.howtosell: Seleziona un cliente e conferma. Le opere saranno collegate al alciente selezionato.
general.startselections: Seleziona oggetti dal menu Opere per creare liste
general.notvalidname: Deve iniziare con una lettera e contenere lettere, numeri e spazi
general.linksent: Una email a {{email}} è stata spedita
general.downloadData: Scarica i dati in formato CSV
general.downloadImages: Scarica le immagini in formato ZIP
general.name: Nome Immagine
general.registrationsuccess: Registrazione Avvenuta. Dovresti ricevere una email per la conferma finale.
general.registrationalready: Questa email è già registrata, oppure c'è un errore di sistema. Riprova per favore.
general.nopage: Sembra che questa pagina non ci sia.
general.operationselections: Seleziona un'azione da esguire con {{sels}} opere selezionate
general.howtoshows: Tieni traccia delle tue opere in mostra ad eventi. Registra i luoghi, le aperture e le chiusure degli eventi.
general.howtoregister: Inserisci la email e ti invieremo un link per confermare la tuo registrazione. L'utilizzo è gratuito e puoi gestire e organizzare le tue opere da subito.
general.passworderror: Uhm...forse il link è scaduto. Richiedine un altro.
general.successreset: Abbiamo spedito una email a {{email}}. Se l'email esiste dovresti ricevere un link per la modifica. Potrebbero essere necessari alcuni minuti per la ricezione.
general.resetExplain: Inserisci la tua email per il link di modifica.
general.passwordExplain: Inserisci la nuova password, e conferma. Se tutto va bene potrai fare login con la nuova password.
general.termscondition: Confermo i termini e le condizioni di servizio
general.emailerror: Sembra che il formato email sia sbagliato
general.registrationsuccessfull: Benvenuto ad Artinventory. Puoi fare login con la tua email e password.
general.registerText: Fai parte della community di Artinventory, e gestisci le tue opere con facilitá
general.welcomeText: Con Artinventory gestire le tue opere, creare una lista, ppure organizzarle come desideri è semplice. Artinventory ha già tante funzionalità che ti facilitano il lavoro di artista rendendolo semplice, ma scrivici i tuoi feedback che sono importanti per migliorare il prodotto. Scrivici per le sue funzionalità o problemi, oppure qualcosa che vorresti aggiunto.
general.upload: Clicca o trascina un file per caricarlo
general.explainSelection: Per aggiungere opere a questa lista, selezionale dalla lista opere generale. Non ti preoccupare dei duplicati, il sistema li rimuove in automatico.
general.howtoreport: Seleziona una lista ed un report e crea una anteprima o scaricalo direttamente. Se hai bisogno di un report personalizzato, inviaci un messaggio tramite il feedback form.
general.couldnotdelete: The system could not delete the record. Please try again later.
general.couldnotupdate: The system could not update the record. Please try again later.
